category_sources: source_facts.description says next-gen documentation generator for C++; official site calls standardese a nextgen Doxygen for C++.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is standardese; official website and GitHub repository use standardese.
docs_sources: Official standardese site provides documentation and examples; official GitHub README documents installation and usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set, so repo returned null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official site and GitHub README describe standardese as a C++ documentation frontend/tool using libclang and producing Markdown/HTML output.
